description: Central schema spine repository containing routing spine, invariants spine, metrics spine, and core contract schemas for the Horror.Place constellation.

POL002_NoRawNarrativeInTier.description: T1-core schema repos must not contain raw narrative content; contract definitions only.

POL003_RequireSchemaRef.description: All artifacts must include a valid schemaRef pointing to an approved schema.

POL004_RequireTargetMetadata.description: All artifacts must include target metadata for routing and registry binding.

POL006_RequireRoutingSpineRef.description: All authoring requests must reference the routing spine for route resolution.

authoringHints.summary: T1-core schema spine repo. Contains routing spine, invariants/metrics spines, and core contract schemas.
aiBehavior: Always verify schemaRef before generating schema or spine artifacts
Route all objectKind T1-core schema requests through this repo
Ensure routing spine routes match manifest allowedObjectKinds
